chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Revision Applications No.177 & 178 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge FOR HEARING OF CASE 17.9.2025 Syed Amir Ali Shah Jilani, advocate for applicant Mr. Muhammad Mohsin, A.P.G. Sindh ------------------------------------------ After hearing at-length, counsel for applicant does not press instant Cr. Misc. Applications and states that it is in fact Wali Khan son of Mir Gul, who was handed over the possession by the applicant on monthly rent and the present respondent Faisal Memon has entered in the premises by Wali Khan and therefore, he will press ejectment proceedings under the Sindh Rented Premises Ordinance, 1979, so also necessary proceedings for alleged forged documents. On the other hand, counsel for respondent No.1 states that applications in the Rent Cases No.02/2024 and 03/2024 have already been dismissed. Accordingly, instant Cr. Misc. Applications are dismissed with the observation that the learned Rent Controller will decide the rent application without being influenced of any finding within the criminal litigation between the parties and shall decide the matter in accordance with law. JUDGE asim/PA
